meaning: 得洛斯(岛)[希腊](位于爱琴海中,据传为Artemis 和Apollo的诞生地)
examples: Delos alone consented to become the birthplace of the future gods.
The shipping method and packaging shall be decided by the company Delos.
Performance, and historical film of Delos will be presented to group and audience.
The Ionians also met annually on the island of Delos, the legendary birthplace of Apollo, their patron deity.
Elena Ambrosiadou, the Greek founder of the Cyprus-based hedge fund Ikos, first laid eyes on the Maltese Falcon as she watched it glide by the Grecian island of Delos.
